# Show links between refunds and their originator invoices

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:5e25c3a085ba01baffa671ce1a7c8281e2d9b5c4d199fcb0b358ac647f796c46
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module shows the links between refunds and their original invoices in the
invoice form and also keep track of refund lines and their original invoice
lines.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to "Invoicing -> customers -> Invoices", create an Invoice
   and validate it by clicking on the 'Confirm' button.
2. Create a Credit Note by clicking on the 'Add Credit Note' button.
3. In the form view of that Credit Note you can see the new field
   'Invoice reference' that is a link to the Original Invoice
   (the one you created in step 1)
4. Come back to the original Invoice created in step 1 and you will see
   a new page in the notebook called 'Refunds'. There will be the Credit Note
   that you created in the previous step.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_refund_link.models.account_move_line.AccountInvoiceLine.copy_data
documentation:
Link refund lines with the original ones when copying move lines from the
`_reverse_move_vals` method.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_refund_link.wizards.account_move_reversal.AccountMoveReversal.reverse_moves
documentation:
Only link invoice lines with theirs original lines when the reversal
move has been done from reversal wizard.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_refund_link.hooks.match_origin_lines
